title: LEVEL UP!
description:
LOUT WINS! LOUT GAINS EXPERIENCE! LOUT IS PLEASED!!!

-------------------

Long, long time ago an user from Channel Frederator organized a collab to celebrate its 500 members....
...too bad that guy never found time to put togheter the entries he recieved... at this point I don't have much hope left... :/
Still, I had fun making it so I don't think it was time wasted!

The subjects of the collab were "500" and "strong", I thought that Lout would've fitted pretty well.

Here's the HYPER HIGH QUALITY version: http://pennaz91.deviantart.com/art/Flash-Animation-LOUT-LEVELS-UP-485611758?ga_submit_new=10%253A1412116185
